textByHash.1d28a9258084daafa23011b938b56c32285c524e: Hi there, my husband and I are adventurers, Captain Janaway brought us here.
textByHash.f7b70fd2273a2f371d144b6b0a380dc29c3340c8: New lands to explore of course! Isn't it exciting? A whole new world that we know nothing about just waiting for us to discover it!
